title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!
